_comment: Strategy comp story matrix config (D-COMP-2 / D-COMP-3). Defines the story narrative, group labels, and expansion thresholds per investment strategy.

value_add.description: Split comps into current-condition (in-place ceiling) vs renovated/repositioned (post-stab target). Surfaces the $/unit gap the value-add thesis must close.

lower.label: Current Condition
lower.description: In-place ceiling — where this deal trades today

upper.label: Renovated / Repositioned
upper.description: Post-stabilization target — where the value-add thesis drives

stabilized.description: Emphasizes recent local sales of the same class. Surfaces cap-rate spread to reveal market consensus and bid-ask range.

ground_up.description: Surfaces recently-delivered comps (vintage ≤ 3 years) and their achieved rents as the ground-truth benchmark for the lease-up pro forma.

redevelopment.description: Highlights comps that traded as obsolete vintage (age ≥ 30 years). Shows the repositioning discount and post-renovation premium the redevelopment thesis must underwrite.
